name: tapagents
description: TapAgents — an opinionated AI product team for Claude Code. 18 curated agents (Strategist, Architect, Designer, Marketing Designer, Product Marketing Manager, Critic, Quality Engineer, Ops/Security, Biz/Finance, Biz/Legal, GTM Launch Strategist, plus operations roles), 20 slash commands, 32 protocols, 16 instrumented enforcement + telemetry hooks, and stack-aware templates that scaffold a startup's worth of product roles into any repo.
